hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); ext=os.path.splitext(fp)[1] if fp else ''; (subprocess.run(['npx','prettier','--write',fp],cwd=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR','.'),capture_output=True), print('Prettier: ' + os.path.basename(fp))) if ext in ['.ts','.tsx','.css','.json'] else None"
